PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.cs ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *.spec.cs ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *Test*.cs ]]; then PROJ=$(find . -name "*.csproj" -path "$(dirname "$FILE")/*" | head -1); if [ -n "$PROJ" ]; then dotnet build "$PROJ" --no-restore --verbosity quiet 2>&1 | tail -20; else dotnet build --no-restore --verbosity quiet 2>&1 | tail -20; fi; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *Test*.cs ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *Tests*.cs ]]; then PROJ=$(find . -name "*.csproj" -path "$(dirname "$FILE")/*" | head -1); if [ -n "$PROJ" ]; then dotnet test "$PROJ" --no-build --verbosity quiet 2>&1 | tail -20; fi; fi'
